# Accessibility & Offline Redress Critique

## 1. Summary of Concern

Describe the accessibility or offline-equity issue.

## 2. Documentation Section

Reference the relevant part of the Appendix, Protocol, or Receipt Layer.

## 3. Offline Parity Check

Does the issue affect:

- [ ] printable receipts
- [ ] mail-in appeals
- [ ] phone-based intake
- [ ] physical assistance centers
- [ ] legal equivalence

## 4. Dignity Preservation

Does the issue risk:

- [ ] cognitive overload
- [ ] inaccessible language
- [ ] discriminatory UX patterns

## 5. Suggested Fix

Optional — propose a parity-restoring change.

## 6. Additional Notes

Any relevant context.
